name: sextant
description: Architecture-aware engineering principles framework. Provides systematic, tiered workflows for bug fixes, new features, refactoring, code review, test writing, requirements refinement, debugging, shipping, sprint planning, migrations, and security audits.

interface.longDescription: Structured engineering skills for planning, debugging, implementation, review, testing, migration, and security work.
defaultPrompt: Plan this implementation in dependency order.
Debug this issue and propose a minimal fix.
Review this change for regressions and risks.
